reviews.comment:
Está buena, edificio de época bien conservado, buena atención y servicios, si deseás parar a tomar mate tiene un lindo parque detrás.

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place, a well-preserved period building, with good service and attention. If you want to stop for a mate, there's a nice park behind it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmeXRtSjhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
He parado varias veces para tomar algo y aprovechar ir al baño. Buena atención, baños limpios, buen ambiente.

(Translated by Google)
I've stopped several times for a drink and to use the restroom. Good service, clean restrooms, nice atmosphere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmak9IU2N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada de vuelta de la costa. Hay q pedir el.sandwich de jamón crudo  queso y manteca!!!!

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way back from the coast. You have to order the prosciutto, cheese, and butter sandwich!

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada en mis viajes a la costa, desde hace 3 décadas a la actualidad, la mejor atención. No entiendo a los que van a Atalaya!!

A must-stop on my trips to the coast, for the last three decades, the best service. I don't understand those who go to Atalaya!!

reviews.comment:
Me gusta mucho! Lo mejor son los mantecados de chocolate. Cañoncitos grandes y medialunas ricas.

(Translated by Google)
I really like it! The best thing is the chocolate shortbread. Big little pastries and delicious croissants.
